From arXiv:2504.11101 'Consensus Entropy: Harnessing Multi-VLM Agreement for Self-Verifying and Self-Improving OCR' (Table 3, 'Representative CE Ensemble Examples On OCRBench'). The row lists four individual model scores feeding into an ensemble: 'Ovis2-1B, Qwen2.5VL-7B, Step1V, Step1o (890, 874, 886, 926)' -- Step1V's own OCRBench score is 886 (raw scale, consistent with other corpus OCRBench entries e.g. ERNIE-4.5-VL 872, InternVL2.5-78B 854). Verified consistently across three independent WebFetch reads of the paper's HTML version (arxiv.org/html/2504.11101v4, dated 06 May 2026 for v4; original submission April 2025). Unusual citation context (score appears inside an ensemble-methods table rather than a dedicated model leaderboard/report), so flagging for reviewer double-check, but the paper is a real, independently-authored academic source with Step1V's individual score explicitly stated.
